items.headline: X-energy raises over $1 billion in largest nuclear IPO on record
items.body: Small modular reactor company X-energy completed public offering on April 24 with Amazon backing. Energy agency head warned Europe has six weeks of jet fuel left as Lufthansa cuts 20,000 flights through 2026.

items.headline: Tanzania reports 518 killed in election violence, far below opposition estimates
items.body: Government commission documented deaths from last year's election, mostly from gunshot wounds. Commission head called the toll not final or conclusive.

items.headline: Peru defense and foreign ministers resign over fighter jet purchase dispute
items.body: Cabinet members quit April 22 after interim president deferred F-16 decision from Lockheed Martin. Economy ministry transferred $462 million initial payment despite president's declared suspension.

items.headline: Japan warns of heightened earthquake risk after 7.4 magnitude strike
items.body: Earthquake on April 20 triggered tsunami warnings for waves up to three meters. Officials placed 182 towns on alert with 1% chance of magnitude 8 quake in next week.
